ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to countries table */,
  "salary_usd" INTEGER /* Salary of the respondent in USD */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to job_titles table */,
  "years_with_this_type_of_job" INTEGER /* Number of years the respondent has been in this type of job */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the respondent */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certification status of the respondent */,
  "population_of_largest_city_within_20_miles" TEXT /* Population of the largest city within 20 miles of the respondent's location */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "date_of_response" TEXT /* Date when the survey response was submitted */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the respondent's company */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the respondent's company */,
  "job_satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Level of job satisfaction on a scale (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "primary_programming_language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used by the respondent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Total years of professional experience */,
  "remote_work_status" TEXT /* Status of remote work (e.g., Full-time remote, Hybrid, On-site) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Category of the job title (e.g., Development, Operations) */,
  "average_salary_range" TEXT /* Average salary range for this job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" INTEGER /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each survey response
